# Basic Usage Examples

This guide covers fundamental Codestral usage patterns and commands.

## 🎯 Getting Started

### First Conversation

```bash
# Start Codestral
codestral

# Basic AI interaction
> Hello! What can you help me with?

> What is the difference between async/await and Promises in JavaScript?

> Can you explain the MVC pattern?
```

### File Mentions

```bash
# Single file mention
> Can you explain what @package.json does?

> Review the code in @src/index.js

# Multiple files
> Compare @old-config.js and @new-config.js

# Glob patterns
> Analyze all React components in @src/components/**/*.jsx

> Review the test files in @tests/**/*.test.js
```

### Basic Commands

```bash
# Get help
> /help

# View current configuration
> /config

# Show files in context
> /files

# Clear conversation context
> /clear

# Search codebase
> /search "useState"
> /search "function.*async" --regex
> /search "API_KEY" --type js,ts

# Change settings
> /set temperature 0.8
> /set maxTokens 2000

# Change autonomy mode
> /mode safe
> /mode autonomous
> /mode full
```

## 📁 File Operations

### Reading Files

```bash
# Ask AI to read and explain a file
> What does @README.md contain?

> Can you summarize the main functions in @src/utils.js?

# AI will automatically use read_file tool
```

### File Analysis

```bash
# Code review
> Please review @src/api/users.js for potential issues

# Architecture analysis  
> Analyze the structure of @src/components/App.jsx

# Documentation review
> Is the documentation in @docs/API.md complete and accurate?
```

### Directory Exploration

```bash
# Explore project structure
> What's the overall structure of this project?

> Can you explain the purpose of each directory in @src/?

# AI will use list_directory tool to explore
```

## 🔍 Search Examples

### Text Search

```bash
# Simple text search
> /search "TODO"

# Search with file type filter
> /search "useState" --type jsx,tsx

# Search in specific directory
> /search "config" --dir src/

# Case sensitive search
> /search "MyComponent" --case-sensitive
```

### Regex Search

```bash
# Function definitions
> /search "function\s+\w+" --regex

# Import statements
> /search "^import.*from" --regex

# Async functions
> /search "async\s+function" --regex

# Class definitions
> /search "class\s+\w+.*{" --regex
```

## 💬 Conversation Patterns

### Context Building

```bash
# Build context gradually
> I'm working on a React application

> The main component is in @src/App.jsx

> I'm having issues with state management in @src/hooks/useAuth.js

> Can you help me debug the authentication flow?
```

### Iterative Development

```bash
# Start with a question
> How can I improve the performance of @src/components/DataTable.jsx?

# Follow up based on AI suggestions
> Can you show me how to implement virtual scrolling?

# Request specific changes
> Please implement the virtual scrolling solution you suggested

# Review the changes
> Can you explain the changes you made?
```

## 🛠️ Tool Usage Examples

### Automatic Tool Usage

When you ask questions that require file access, the AI automatically uses tools:

```bash
# This triggers read_file tool
> What's in @src/config.js?

# This triggers list_directory tool  
> What files are in the src directory?

# This triggers search_code tool
> Find all uses of the useState hook
```

### Understanding Tool Execution

Watch for tool execution indicators:

```
> Can you read @src/app.js?

🔧 Using tool: read_file
📄 Reading: src/app.js

🤖 I can see your app.js file contains...
```

## 📊 Session Management

### Saving and Loading Sessions

```bash
# Sessions are auto-saved every 10 messages by default

# Manual save
> /save my-project-session

# Load previous session
> /load my-project-session

# List saved sessions
> /sessions
```

### Context Management

```bash
# Check what's in context
> /files

# Clear context when switching topics
> /clear

# Add specific files to context
> Let's work on @src/components/Header.jsx and @src/styles/header.css
```

## 🎨 Output Formatting

### Code Blocks

The AI automatically formats code with syntax highlighting:

```javascript
// AI responses include properly formatted code
function example() {
  console.log("This will be syntax highlighted");
}
```

### Diffs and Changes

When AI suggests changes, you'll see formatted diffs:

```diff
- const oldCode = "this";
+ const newCode = "that";
```

## 🔧 Configuration Examples

### Quick Configuration Changes

```bash
# Make AI more creative
> /set temperature 0.9

# Reduce response length
> /set maxTokens 1000

# Change to faster model
> /set model mistral-medium-latest

# Enable debug logging
> /set logLevel debug
```

### Autonomy Mode Examples

```bash
# Safe mode (default) - requires approval for writes
> /mode safe
> Please fix the bug in @src/utils.js
# AI will ask for approval before writing

# Autonomous mode - auto-approves file operations
> /mode autonomous  
> Please fix the bug in @src/utils.js
# AI will fix without asking

# Full mode - auto-approves most operations
> /mode full
> Run the tests and fix any failures
# AI will run commands and fix files automatically
```

## 🚨 Error Handling

### Common Issues and Solutions

```bash
# File not found
> Can you read @nonexistent.js?
# AI will suggest similar files or ask you to check the path

# Permission denied
> Please modify @/etc/hosts
# AI will explain the permission issue and suggest alternatives

# Large file warning
> Can you read @large-dataset.json?
# AI will warn about file size and ask for confirmation
```

### Recovery Commands

```bash
# Reset configuration
> /setup

# Clear context if confused
> /clear

# Check current status
> /config
> /files
```

## 📝 Best Practices

### Effective File Mentions

```bash
# ✅ Good - specific files
> Review @src/components/UserProfile.jsx

# ✅ Good - related files
> Compare @src/api/old-auth.js and @src/api/new-auth.js

# ❌ Avoid - too broad
> Review @**/*
```

### Clear Communication

```bash
# ✅ Good - specific request
> Find security vulnerabilities in @src/auth/login.js

# ✅ Good - context provided
> I'm getting a 404 error. Can you check @src/routes/api.js?

# ❌ Avoid - vague request
> Fix my code
```

### Efficient Context Usage

```bash
# ✅ Good - build context gradually
> I'm working on user authentication
> The login component is @src/Login.jsx
> Can you help improve the validation?

# ❌ Avoid - loading too many files at once
> Review @src/**/*.js @tests/**/*.js @docs/**/*.md
```
